title: heliocereus × jenkinsonii
intro: Heliocereus × jenkinsonii, also known as the Jenkinson's Prickly Pear, is a hybrid cactus plant that belongs to the genus Cereus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Heliocereus × jenkinsonii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and crushing the stems, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or topical creams.
